contact.message_us_desc: The fastest way to reach us is via WhatsApp. Send us a message, a photo of your bike's issue, or just say hello!

hero.desc: Fietsmaker 4 You brings you the finest selection of premium bicycles in Amsterdam. Experience the perfect blend of performance, style, and comfort.

featured.title: Amsterdam's Finest
featured.desc: At Hagedoornweg 70a, we don't just sell bikes; we curate lifestyles. Whether you need a daily commuter or a high-performance machine, our expert team ensures every ride is smooth, stylish, and tailored to you.

services.title: Premium Repairs
services.desc: Expert maintenance for all bike types, ensuring your ride is always safe and smooth.

services.title: Custom Builds
services.desc: Create the bike of your dreams with our bespoke customization services.

services.title: E-Bike Specialists
services.desc: Mechanical repairs for e-bikes are available now. Electrical repair & diagnostics coming soon!

hospitality.desc_1: At Fietsmaker 4 You, you're never just a customer — you're a guest. Owner Wasim runs the shop with genuine warmth and hospitality. Whether you're waiting for a quick repair or just stopping by to browse, the atmosphere is always relaxed and welcoming.
hospitality.desc_2_highlight: If he's busy working alone, feel free to treat yourself to a drink
hospitality.desc_2_end: while you wait. It's on Wasim. 😊
bullets: Speaks Dutch, English & Arabic — always easy to communicate
Passionate bike builder & collector with 5+ years in the trade
Honest advice, fair prices, no surprise costs
Amsterdam resident since 2009 — part of the community

story.title: A Passion Turned
story.p1: Wasim has always had a deep love for bicycles — not just as a mode of transport, but as works of craft and engineering. Born in Syria and calling Amsterdam home since 2009, he brought that passion with him and turned it into something the whole community could benefit from.
story.p2: He doesn't just fix bikes — he collects them, studies them, and builds custom bicycles from scratch. Every bike that rolls into the shop gets treated with the same care and attention as if it were his own.
story.p3: Fluent in Dutch, English and Arabic, Wasim makes everyone feel at home — whether you're a local, a tourist, or a fellow bike enthusiast just looking to chat over a cup of coffee.
bullets: Passionate bike builder — collects and builds custom bicycles
Honest advice, fair prices, no surprise costs
Amsterdam resident since 2009 — a true part of the community
Drop in, ask for your free drink, and feel right at home

custom.title: Custom
custom.p1: One of Wasim's greatest joys is building bikes from the ground up. From track bikes to city cruisers, every custom build is a unique collaboration between Wasim and the client — crafted with care, precision and personality.

hospitality.title: You're Always
hospitality.p1: Wasim believes a bike shop should feel like a second living room. Drop by, say hello, and don't be shy —
hospitality.p1_end: while we take care of your bike. You're not just a customer here, you're a guest.

head.title: Our
head.desc: Professional care for your bicycle. From quick fixes to complete rebuilds, our certified mechanics treat every bike as their own.

tiers.title: Repair Visit
tiers.subtitle: You only pay for what needs fixing
tiers.note: Bring your bike in for any repair and the basics below are on us — no hidden costs.

tiers.title: E-Bike Services
tiers.subtitle: Mechanical repairs available now
tiers.note: Electrical diagnostics and battery services coming soon.

price_list.title: Full
price_list.desc: All prices include labour. Parts extra if needed.
